GlobalPolicy.log-format: No structured logs. Step-based progress: _step/_step_ok/_step_fail with numbered output.
GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: bash -n syntax check after every edit. Collector output verification via --dry-run.
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Verify all AI modules source without error. Test JSON extraction with sample LLM responses.
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: bats test suite for collector, config, and plan parsing. Full flow integration test with mocked API.
GlobalPolicy.redaction: API key must never appear in test output or logs. Use mock config for tests.

VF-001.NAME: Advisor Happy Path
VF-001.scenario: User runs mo advisor, sees report, selects items, confirms with "yes", items deleted successfully.
VF-001.expected-outcome: All selected items removed. Summary shows correct count and recovered space.

required-signals.signal-1: Step progress shows all steps completed with _step_ok
required-signals.signal-2: Report rendered with 4 sections: Disk Usage, Not Recommended, Low Risk, Medium/High Risk
required-signals.signal-3: Menu shows [x]/[ ] checkboxes with item count
required-signals.signal-4: Confirmation lists paths and requires typed yes

VF-002.NAME: Protected Path Rejection
VF-002.scenario: LLM recommends a protected path (e.g. /Users/.../Library/Messages). safe_remove must reject it.
VF-002.expected-outcome: Item shows "Skipped (protected)" in execution summary. No data loss.

required-signals.signal-1: safe_remove returns non-zero for protected paths
required-signals.signal-2: Skipped items counted separately from removed items

VF-003.NAME: Collector Accuracy
VF-003.scenario: Collector scans user dirs, system dirs, and large containers with timeout guards.
VF-003.expected-outcome: All 9+ sections output. Sizes are non-zero for existing directories. Timeouts return 0 gracefully.

required-signals.signal-1: === SECTION === headers present for all sections
required-signals.signal-2: _fast_du_sk_bg returns 0 on timeout, does not hang
required-signals.signal-3: Docker, Applications, Homebrew sizes reported when present

scenarios.scenario-2: ai_config_is_configured returns true when endpoint+model set
scenarios.scenario-3: ai_config_is_configured returns false when config missing

scenarios.scenario-1: ai_client_chat returns content from mocked 200 response

module-checks.check-2: mo advisor --dry-run (manual — verify all sections present including extended)

scenarios.scenario-1: collector_run_all outputs all section headers including DOCKER, HOMEBREW, XCODE
scenarios.scenario-2: _fast_du_sk returns numeric value for known directory
_collect_homebrew_info reports cellar breakdown when brew present
scenarios.scenario-3: _collect_xcode_info reports simulator list and archive sizes

scenarios.scenario-1: _extract_json_plan extracts JSON from markdown + code fence
scenarios.scenario-2: _parse_plan_items parses JSON plan into pipe-delimited lines
scenarios.scenario-4: _extract_json_plan returns empty when no JSON block present
scenarios.scenario-5: _render_report formats table and list items correctly

Gate-Phase-1.goal: AI advisor core works end-to-end with real LLM endpoint.

required-evidence.evidence-3: Full advisor flow tested in terminal with real LLM

Gate-Phase-2.goal: Modularized advisor with extended collection and UX polish.

commands.command-2: mo advisor --dry-run (verify DOCKER, HOMEBREW, XCODE sections)

required-evidence.evidence-1: All 6 lib/ai/*.sh files pass syntax check
required-evidence.evidence-2: Dry run shows 12+ collector sections (original 9 + Docker, Homebrew, Xcode)
required-evidence.evidence-4: F key in menu cycles risk filter
required-evidence.evidence-5: API retry works on transient failures

required-evidence.evidence-2: advisor documented in mole help and README
